en: I can help you eat them. Sometimes it's really great to do deals with other sharks,
ko: 감사하지만 안 됩니다 로버트 완전히 빠지신 거죠? 먹는 건 도와드릴 수 있어요

en: but I have everything you need. Everything. What do you want to do?
I think that, you know, you can speak to the numbers, but we think that our valuation
ko: 숫자로 말씀드릴 수 있지만 저희 기업가치가

en: is fair and that 20% is too much for us to give up. That's fine. That's how we feel right now.
ko: 적정하다고 생각하고 20%는 저희한테

en: Good for you guys. Good for you guys. You guys are very impressive. And you will do great. Okay,
ko: 너무 많아요 괜찮아요 지금 그렇게 느끼시는 거죠 대단하세요 정말 잘 하실 거예요

en: well thank you. Thank you for sharing with us.
ko: 감사합니다

en: Thank you.
